# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / CI / tooling

## How was it tested?

<!-- Simulator/device, iOS version, steps followed. Screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The project builds in Xcode 16+
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots
- [ ] Strings and code are in English
- [ ] Dialing still goes through `tel:` URLs (user confirms the call)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
